issues.detail: The instructions lack explicit error handling and edge case coverage.

scenarios.name: Chatbot with userId-scoped memory retrieval and store
scenarios.rationale: Baseline guesses method names (sm.query, sm.store) and is uncertain about scoping; treatment uses client.memories.search({query,userId,limit}), injects results into the system prompt, and calls client.memories.add({content,userId}) as documented.

scenarios.name: Cross-source search via Google Drive connector
scenarios.rationale: Baseline invents unrelated connector APIs; treatment calls client.connectors.connect({type:'google_drive',userId,credentials:{access_token}}) and searches with includeConnectors:true exactly as the skill specifies.
